content:
# Recommendations — after iter-036

## Headline: SNAP-S1 module lane is COMPLETE. Do NOT re-assign SectionGradedRing.lean.
All three remaining targets (`moduleTensorPowAdd_zero_left`, `moduleSectionAction_one_smul`,
`sectionGradedModule_gmodule`) landed axiom-clean. File is 0-sorry, build green 2632.
`M(X,L,F)=⊕_m Γ(F⊗L^{⊗m})` is `DirectSum.Gmodule` over `Γ_*(X,L)` ∀L,F. The capped SNAP-S1 stretch
(STRATEGY abort metric: ">2 real-attempt iters on (A)") closed with (A) in 1 iter and the full lane in 5
elapsed / 3 real-attempt iters. **No live prover frontier remains in this file.**

## CRITICAL / HIGH
- (none) — both review subagents returned PASS with 0 must-fix.

## What the plan agent should decide next (route pivot)
The only remaining in-project frontier is the **χ / higher-cohomology leg** (4 deferred sorries in
`QuotScheme.lean` — `def:hilbert_polynomial`, `def:quot_functor`, `Grassmannian.*` re-exports). Per
ARCHON_MEMORY these are χ-semantic and need the cohomology leg this i=0 project does not hold; the goal
seed `Grassmannian.represents` is already delivered axiom-clean and disjoint. **Recommended: declare the
SNAP-S1 + section-graded-ring/module deliverable closed and either (a) hand off to merge-back, or (b)
open the cohomology leg only if the strategy authorizes new scope.** Do not send a prover at the 4 χ
sorries without a strategy update — they have been correctly deferred since iter-001.

## MEDIUM (blueprint coverage — plan agent's prose domain)
- `lem:moduleSectionAction_coherent` prose + `\uses{}` reference `def:sectionsCast` where the Lean uses
  `moduleSectionsCast` (the module-graded transport). lean-vs-blueprint-checker minor. Plan agent: fix the
  `\uses{}`/prose to `def:moduleSectionsCast` (or add it) for graph accuracy.
- Coverage debt (small, new this/last iter): Lean helpers `moduleSectionsCast_apply`,
  `moduleSectionsCast_sectionsCast`, `moduleTensorPow_zero` have no `\lean{}` blueprint block. Low
  priority infra; blueprint a one-line block each if the planner wants honest DAG coverage.

## LOW / notes
- lean-auditor: 2 remaining DEFERRED handoff blocks in SectionGradedRing.lean (L746 coequalizer
  naturality, L800 superseded-handoff). Down from 7; out-of-cone narrative, harmless. Prover may prune on
  next touch (but there is no next touch — file is done).
- lean-auditor: 4 pre-existing typed sorries in `QuotScheme.lean` (L126/165/201/228) — the χ leg above;
  no in-cone consumer.

## Blueprint-doctor (out-of-cone, do NOT edit — merge-time per ARCHON_MEMORY)
Dormant COMPLETE/DEFERRED chapters only: `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` (2 phantom covers-files + 14
broken refs), `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (4), `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (13). Active SGR chapter is
doctor-clean. Resolve at merge.

## Coverage debt (full picture)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 356 `lean_aux` nodes, essentially all pre-existing dormant
`Grassmannian.*` / `GlueDescent` / `QuotScheme` / `RelativeTensorCoequalizer` decls (merge-time task,
not an iter blocker). The new iter-036 deliverables ARE blueprinted (labels resolve). Only the 3 small
SGR helpers named under MEDIUM are genuinely new uncovered nodes.

## Do-NOT-retry
- `moduleSectionAction_one_smul` with `GradedMonoid.GOne.one` written literally in the statement — it is a
  whnf statement-elaboration bomb. Always spell `(1 : sectionDeg L 0)`.
- The 4 χ sorries without a strategy-authorized cohomology scope (deferred since iter-001).
